He doesn\'t look surprised. He isn\'t running away. column4: ((Title=LOCTABLE("/Game/Main/NPC/DT/NPC_Name_ST.NPC_Name_ST", "Name_Leon"),Contents=NSLOCTEXT("[E47D69849C237B447BAA99323536CBE5]", "4D13F7A742EC0FA8A5ABF19E1B636DCF", "My story is one of the primal ones."),BackButtonOn=False,NextButtonOn=True,YesButtonOn=False,NoButtonOn=False,DoneButtonOn=False,LeftFace="/Game/Main/NPC/Pics/Male/Leon/M_Leon_Face_Basic.M_Leon_Face_Basic",LeftBody="/Game/Main/NPC/Pics/Male/Leon/M_Leon_Body_M4.M_Leon_Body_M4",RightFace="/Game/Main/NPC/Pics/Male/Joey/M_Joey_Face_Basic.M_Joey_Face_Basic",RightBody="/Game/Main/NPC/Pics/Main/M_9_OldTown/M_Joey_Body_M9.M_Joey_Body_M9",LeftFocusOn=True,RightFocusOn=False,RunEventBP=False,QuestEventBP=None),(Title=LOCTABLE("/Game/Main/NPC/DT/NPC_Name_ST.NPC_Name_ST", "A_System"),Contents=NSLOCTEXT("[E47D69849C237B447BAA99323536CBE5]", "F4539E93459AE023854CBBA21A2CE60A", "Leon says it without pride - just as a fact, the way someone might describe the foundation of a house. He\'s known about the Void for a long time."),BackButtonOn=False,NextButtonOn=True,YesButtonOn=False,NoButtonOn=False,DoneButtonOn=False,LeftFace=None,LeftBody=None,RightFace=None,RightBody=None,LeftFocusOn=True,RightFocusOn=True,RunEventBP=False,QuestEventBP=None),(Title=LOCTABLE("/Game/Main/NPC/DT/NPC_Name_ST.NPC_Name_ST", "Name_Leon"),Contents=NSLOCTEXT("[E47D69849C237B447BAA99323536CBE5]", "C45EF82F4A0DAF7928235BAC997A9566", "I\'ve always known it was there. I chose not to cross."),BackButtonOn=False,NextButtonOn=True,YesButtonOn=False,NoButtonOn=False,DoneButtonOn=False,LeftFace="/Game/Main/NPC/Pics/Male/Leon/M_Leon_Face_Basic.M_Leon_Face_Basic",LeftBody="/Game/Main/NPC/Pics/Male/Leon/M_Leon_Body_M4.M_Leon_Body_M4",RightFace="/Game/Main/NPC/Pics/Male/Joey/M_Joey_Face_Basic.M_Joey_Face_Basic",RightBody="/Game/Main/NPC/Pics/Main/M_9_OldTown/M_Joey_Body_M9.M_Joey_Body_M9",LeftFocusOn=True,RightFocusOn=False,RunEventBP=False,QuestEventBP=None),(Title=LOCTABLE("/Game/Main/NPC/DT/NPC_Name_ST.NPC_Name_ST", "A_System"),Contents=NSLOCTEXT("[E47D69849C237B447BAA99323536CBE5]", "06D86D1942E7D32B814FD087CDAFF3DA", "Something in his tone suggests the choice wasn\'t simple."),BackButtonOn=False,NextButtonOn=False,YesButtonOn=False,NoButtonOn=False,DoneButtonOn=True,LeftFace=None,LeftBody=None,RightFace=None,RightBody=None,LeftFocusOn=True,RightFocusOn=True,RunEventBP=False,QuestEventBP=None))

column3: ((Title=LOCTABLE("/Game/Main/NPC/DT/NPC_Name_ST.NPC_Name_ST", "A_System"),Contents=NSLOCTEXT("[E47D69849C237B447BAA99323536CBE5]", "1AF6C00B4F2E3BDB6166ACAE5388C24B", "Keep talking to Leon."),BackButtonOn=False,NextButtonOn=False,YesButtonOn=False,NoButtonOn=False,DoneButtonOn=True,LeftFace=None,LeftBody=None,RightFace=None,RightBody=None,LeftFocusOn=True,RightFocusOn=True,RunEventBP=False,QuestEventBP=None))
column4: ((Title=LOCTABLE("/Game/Main/NPC/DT/NPC_Name_ST.NPC_Name_ST", "Name_Leon"),Contents=NSLOCTEXT("[E47D69849C237B447BAA99323536CBE5]", "003A884A481FBDD6500DCEA6E068EEC5", "If I leave... this story stops existing."),BackButtonOn=False,NextButtonOn=True,YesButtonOn=False,NoButtonOn=False,DoneButtonOn=False,LeftFace="/Game/Main/NPC/Pics/Male/Leon/M_Leon_Face_Basic.M_Leon_Face_Basic",LeftBody="/Game/Main/NPC/Pics/Male/Leon/M_Leon_Body_M4.M_Leon_Body_M4",RightFace="/Game/Main/NPC/Pics/Male/Joey/M_Joey_Face_Basic.M_Joey_Face_Basic",RightBody="/Game/Main/NPC/Pics/Main/M_9_OldTown/M_Joey_Body_M9.M_Joey_Body_M9",LeftFocusOn=True,RightFocusOn=False,RunEventBP=False,QuestEventBP=None),(Title=LOCTABLE("/Game/Main/NPC/DT/NPC_Name_ST.NPC_Name_ST", "A_System"),Contents=NSLOCTEXT("[E47D69849C237B447BAA99323536CBE5]", "A735563B477D69699D9129A95D8F8DD7", "Leon explains it without dramatics. A primal story isn\'t just a narrative - it\'s a foundation. Other stories were built on top of it, after it, because of it. Without it, the ones that followed have nothing to stand on."),BackButtonOn=False,NextButtonOn=True,YesButtonOn=False,NoButtonOn=False,DoneButtonOn=False,LeftFace=None,LeftBody=None,RightFace=None,RightBody=None,LeftFocusOn=True,RightFocusOn=True,RunEventBP=False,QuestEventBP=None),(Title=LOCTABLE("/Game/Main/NPC/DT/NPC_Name_ST.NPC_Name_ST", "Name_Leon"),Contents=NSLOCTEXT("[E47D69849C237B447BAA99323536CBE5]", "A151B5F7413A89F251398A95787A3D57", "I could choose another story. But I don\'t have that freedom. Not really."),BackButtonOn=False,NextButtonOn=True,YesButtonOn=False,NoButtonOn=False,DoneButtonOn=False,LeftFace="/Game/Main/NPC/Pics/Male/Leon/M_Leon_Face_Basic.M_Leon_Face_Basic",LeftBody="/Game/Main/NPC/Pics/Male/Leon/M_Leon_Body_M4.M_Leon_Body_M4",RightFace="/Game/Main/NPC/Pics/Male/Joey/M_Joey_Face_Basic.M_Joey_Face_Basic",RightBody="/Game/Main/NPC/Pics/Main/M_9_OldTown/M_Joey_Body_M9.M_Joey_Body_M9",LeftFocusOn=True,RightFocusOn=False,RunEventBP=False,QuestEventBP=None),(Title=LOCTABLE("/Game/Main/NPC/DT/NPC_Name_ST.NPC_Name_ST", "A_System"),Contents=NSLOCTEXT("[E47D69849C237B447BAA99323536CBE5]", "D28BEA984AD951E856FBC986C91DED76", "He looks at Joey for a moment, then back at you."),BackButtonOn=False,NextButtonOn=False,YesButtonOn=False,NoButtonOn=False,DoneButtonOn=True,LeftFace=None,LeftBody=None,RightFace=None,RightBody=None,LeftFocusOn=True,RightFocusOn=True,RunEventBP=False,QuestEventBP=None),(Title=LOCTABLE("/Game/Main/NPC/DT/NPC_Name_ST.NPC_Name_ST", "Name_Leon"),Contents=NSLOCTEXT("[E47D69849C237B447BAA99323536CBE5]", "D75A753B4FC89EC789A52BA42AB8BFE3", "Go find Hades.
